_comment: Independently authored 'must-know-to-resume' facts. A fact is recovered from a text if ALL of its `requires` substrings appear (case-insensitive). These are written from the point of view of 'what a developer must know to resume this project', NOT copied from how threadline stores state.

facts.note: open loop: login rate limiting not done
known trap: naive datetime.utcnow() timezone bug
active caveat: /admin bypasses auth in dev
